subject: fix(html): remove all inline styles from project.html
body:
Replaced 8 inline style attributes with proper CSS classes:
- Loading state: style="text-align..." → .loading-state class
- Project hero: style="margin-bottom..." → .project-hero class
- Title row: style="display:flex..." → .project-title-row class
- Description: style="color:..." → .project-description class
- Actions: style="margin-top..." → .project-actions class
- Private label: style="cursor:default..." → .private-label class

Both HTML files now have zero inline styles. All presentation is in
CSS classes within the <style> block (project.html) or styles.css.
